default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on blog strategy, performance, and new analytics tools.](https://fathom.video/share/rX4BYLVBNrrLodT-z_dD_Cuk49ZGKwt1?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Analytics Tool:** Growth X is replacing Scrunch with "CheckThat," a new LLM-powered platform providing real-time competitor visibility and content gaps. Vizcom gets 90-day Business Premium access to provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/rX4BYLVBNrrLodT-z_dD_Cuk49ZGKwt1?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [**Blog Publishing Strategy:** To avoid "chunking," Growth X will propose new blog layouts and a staggered publishing schedule (est. 10 articles/week). The team will also fix a bug causing new posts to appear at the bottom of the blog page.](https://fathom.video/share/rX4BYLVBNrrLodT-z_dD_Cuk49ZGKwt1?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [**Conversion Goals & CTAs:** Weekly targets are set to regain pre-migration signup levels (550+) and increase demo requests (90–100+). Blog CTAs will be tailored to content funnel stage (e.g., ToFu → Product Page, BoFu → Demo Request).](https://fathom.video/share/rX4BYLVBNrrLodT-z_dD_Cuk49ZGKwt1?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
  - [**Technical SEO:** Vizcom will implement structured data via GTM using provided guides. Growth X will add alt tags to all new and backlogged content to improve image SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/rX4BYLVBNrrLodT-z_dD_Cuk49ZGKwt1?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)

## Topics

### Blog Publishing Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Publishing a large volume of new SEO content risks "chunking" the main blog page, overwhelming users and diluting the brand experience.](https://fathom.video/share/rX4BYLVBNrrLodT-z_dD_Cuk49ZGKwt1?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [**Bug:** A new test post appeared at the bottom of the blog page, not the top. Growth X will investigate.](https://fathom.video/share/rX4BYLVBNrrLodT-z_dD_Cuk49ZGKwt1?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [**Solution:** Growth X will propose new blog layouts and a staggered publishing schedule (est. 10 articles/week) to maintain a steady flow without overwhelming the page.](https://fathom.video/share/rX4BYLVBNrrLodT-z_dD_Cuk49ZGKwt1?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)

### Content Pipeline & Technical SEO

  - [**Content Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/rX4BYLVBNrrLodT-z_dD_Cuk49ZGKwt1?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
      - [12 drafts ready for Vizcom review.](https://fathom.video/share/rX4BYLVBNrrLodT-z_dD_Cuk49ZGKwt1?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
      - [25 articles staged in the CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/rX4BYLVBNrrLodT-z_dD_Cuk49ZGKwt1?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
      - [5 working drafts in progress.](https://fathom.video/share/rX4BYLVBNrrLodT-z_dD_Cuk49ZGKwt1?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [**Alt Tag Backlog:** Growth X will add alt tags to all new content and the existing backlog to improve image SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/rX4BYLVBNrrLodT-z_dD_Cuk49ZGKwt1?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [**Structured Data:** Implementation guides for Webflow and GTM are in the shared Google Drive.](https://fathom.video/share/rX4BYLVBNrrLodT-z_dD_Cuk49ZGKwt1?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [**AI Visibility:** An Adobe LLLM Optimizer check flagged low bot readability on some pages, likely due to JavaScript. Growth X will conduct a full technical audit next week.](https://fathom.video/share/rX4BYLVBNrrLodT-z_dD_Cuk49ZGKwt1?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)

### New Analytics Platform: CheckThat

  - [**Rationale:** Replaces Scrunch with a new LLM-powered platform for deeper competitive intelligence.](https://fathom.video/share/rX4BYLVBNrrLodT-z_dD_Cuk49ZGKwt1?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [**Key Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/rX4BYLVBNrrLodT-z_dD_Cuk49ZGKwt1?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
      - [**Real-time Visibility:** Tracks competitor performance on a shared library of 100k prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/rX4BYLVBNrrLodT-z_dD_Cuk49ZGKwt1?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
      - [**Content Gap Analysis:** Identifies topics where competitors are ranking but Vizcom is not.](https://fathom.video/share/rX4BYLVBNrrLodT-z_dD_Cuk49ZGKwt1?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
      - [**Competitor Profiles:** Provides detailed overviews (products, personas, pricing) for strategic research.](https://fathom.video/share/rX4BYLVBNrrLodT-z_dD_Cuk49ZGKwt1?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [**Access:** Vizcom gets 90-day Business Premium access to provide feedback during the beta period.](https://fathom.video/share/rX4BYLVBNrrLodT-z_dD_Cuk49ZGKwt1?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
  - [**Context:** Industry-wide visibility drops (e.g., Blender -24%) provide context, showing if Vizcom's performance is an isolated issue or part of a broader trend.](https://fathom.video/share/rX4BYLVBNrrLodT-z_dD_Cuk49ZGKwt1?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)

### Performance & Conversion Goals

  - [**Performance:** Organic sessions and engagement rates show a positive upward trend since the site migration.](https://fathom.video/share/rX4BYLVBNrrLodT-z_dD_Cuk49ZGKwt1?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
  - [**Weekly Conversion Goals:**](https://fathom.video/share/rX4BYLVBNrrLodT-z_dD_Cuk49ZGKwt1?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
